siteMetadata.title: Jesse Zhang
siteMetadata.description: Greatest Gatsby Personal Website Template for Academic Usage
siteMetadata.author: Jesse Zhang
introduction: I'm a Senior student at [BJUT](https://english.bjut.edu.cn/), advised by [Xiaoyan Li](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=MCzJnAQAAAAJ&hl=en).

My research interests span a wide range of topics, including *Large Language Models (LLMs), Agents, Reinforcement Learning, and Embodied Intelligence*. My vision is to ensure that everyone can benefit from artificial intelligence, rather than seeing their quality of life and well-being diminished by technological advancements.

## Skills 
 ### Programming 
 - Python, C++, JavaScript/Typescript, SQL 
 ### Frameworks & tools 
 - PyTorch, OpenAI Triton, React/Next.js, Docker, Git

education.title: High School Diploma
education.location: The Affiliated High School of Peking University (pkuschool)

data.title: Software Engineer at [Pony.AI](https://pony.ai/?lang=en)
data.description: Large language model consultant, research and development of automatic labeling system

data.title: Teaching Assistant of Python Programing (undergrad level)
data.description: Worked with Prof. [Junbiao Pang](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=sAB4Cm4AAAAJ&hl=zh-CN), providing technical support for classroom instruction, designing educational experiments, and facilitating post-class Q&A sessions has garnered positive feedback and appreciation from students.

data.title: Kaggle Silver Medal (Top 4%), Team Leader
data.description: By utilizing my knowledge in Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Large Language Models (LLMs), I achieved a high ranking through methods such as fine-tuning and constructing sampling datasets.
